POST /api/v1/auth/login — 200 patient login returns token + user @smoke

Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: 201
Received: 429
201: unique patient, token returned; teardown DELETE /auth/me
201: valid doctorRecordId → token + doctorProfile; teardown DELETE /auth/me

Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: 400
Received: 429
400 VALIDATION_ERROR when email is malformed
400 VALIDATION_ERROR when password is too short
400 VALIDATION_ERROR when doctorRecordId is missing

Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality

Expected: 404
Received: 429
404 DOCTOR_NOT_FOUND when doctorRecordId does not exist
